title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
author: Atlas Cooper
Distributed AI Researcher
description: Coordinate multiple RL agents—but emergent behaviors are unpredictable
content:
Multiple agents learning simultaneously create complex emergent dynamics.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Swarm Intelligence Awakening (2040)](/docs/articles/swarm-awakening-2040)
